title: macrocnemum stylocarpum
intro: Macrocnemum stylocarpum, also known as the Australian sandpaper tree, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, characterized by its distinctive sandpapery bark. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Macrocnemum stylocarpum include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and pain relief. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and its herbal preparations are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
